Baloot Blitz

Welcome to Baloot Blitz! A fast-paced card puzzle game inspired by the traditional Baloot card game. Cards fall from above into a grid, and you must arrange them to form special combinations. Create valid Baloot patterns like Sary (four of a kind), Khamsa (five consecutive cards), and more to clear cards and score points. Progress through increasingly challenging levels, managing limited time and grid space. Don't let the cards stack to the top, or it's game over!

Left Arrow: Move falling card left | Right Arrow: Move falling card right | Down Arrow: Speed up card fall | Space: Drop card instantly | Z: Rotate card order (in multi-card mode) | Enter: Start game from title screen | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart game (from game over screen)
